docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,795.00 FILED BY WANG, TINGJUN AS TO DEFENDANT DIEP, THUY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, TINGJUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIEP, THUY FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE MEMORANDUM INCORPORATED IN THE JUDGMENT IN DIEP V WANG, CSM-18-858712 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF TINGJUN WANG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY THEIR OWN NON-CERTIFIED COURT CANTONESE INTERPRETER FRANCES HA. CLERK G. FELICIANO ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETER'S OATH TO FRANCES HA. DEFENDANT THUY DIEP IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
